moduleDocs: docs/modules/inventory.md: DispatchController at /api/v1/dispatch/** with 8 endpoints (pending, preview, confirm, slip, order, status, backorder cancel, challan PDF). Owned by inventory module (transport/controller). Commercial/accounting delegated to SalesDispatchReconciliationService.
docs/modules/sales.md: DispatchController (inventory module) at /api/v1/dispatch/**. POST /api/v1/dispatch/confirm delegates to sales reconciliation.
docs/modules/orchestrator.md: Orchestrator dispatch is deprecated. Canonical path is POST /api/v1/dispatch/confirm via inventory (transport) + sales (commercial). Two-layer seam documented.
flowDocs: docs/flows/inventory-management.md: 8 dispatch endpoints listed under DispatchController (/api/v1/dispatch/**). POST /api/v1/dispatch/confirm triggers AR, COGS, invoice.
docs/flows/order-to-cash.md: Dispatch section under DispatchController (/api/v1/dispatch/**). POST /api/v1/dispatch/confirm with OPERATIONAL_DISPATCH role.
handoffDocs: docs/frontend-handoff-commercial.md: 7 dispatch endpoints listed (GET /api/v1/dispatch/pending, GET /api/v1/dispatch/preview/{slipId}, POST /api/v1/dispatch/confirm, GET /api/v1/dispatch/slip/{slipId}, GET /api/v1/dispatch/order/{orderId}, PATCH /api/v1/dispatch/slip/{slipId}/status, GET /api/v1/dispatch/slip/{slipId}/challan/pdf). Module boundary: Inventory (controller), Sales (commercial).
docs/frontend-handoff-operations.md: Dispatch listed under /api/v1/dispatch/**. Inventory module (controller), Sales (commercial ownership).
surfaces.notes: All doc types consistently document /api/v1/dispatch/** as owned by inventory module for transport/controller and sales module for commercial/accounting side effects. POST /api/v1/dispatch/confirm is the single canonical write endpoint. Orchestrator dispatch is consistently documented as deprecated/blocked. The two-layer seam (inventory transport + sales commercial) is documented consistently across all doc types.

moduleDocs: docs/modules/admin-portal-rbac.md: Super-admin restricted to /api/v1/superadmin/**. Admin portal at /api/v1/portal/* (ADMIN_OR_ACCOUNTING). Dealer portal at /api/v1/dealer-portal/* (DEALER_ONLY). Clear host isolation enforced.
docs/modules/sales.md: Dealer self-service at /api/v1/dealer-portal/** with ROLE_DEALER. Dealer support tickets at /api/v1/dealer-portal/support/tickets/**.
flowDocs: docs/flows/tenant-admin-management.md: Super-admin endpoints at /api/v1/superadmin/**. Admin at /api/v1/admin/**.
docs/flows/order-to-cash.md: Dealer self-service at /api/v1/dealer-portal/** (dashboard, ledger, invoices, aging, orders, credit requests, support). ROLE_DEALER auto-scoped via JWT.
docs/flows/invoice-dealer-finance.md: Portal finance at /api/v1/portal/finance/** (admin/accounting). Dealer self-service at /api/v1/dealer-portal/** (dealer). Host isolation strictly separated.
docs/flows/auth-identity.md: Super-admin at /api/v1/superadmin/**. Dealer user at /api/v1/dealer-portal/**.
handoffDocs: docs/frontend-handoff-commercial.md: Portal finance at /api/v1/portal/finance/* (ADMIN/ACCOUNTING). Dealer portal at /api/v1/dealer-portal/** (DEALER, auto-scoped). Support tickets split between /api/v1/portal/support/tickets and /api/v1/dealer-portal/support/tickets. Clear admin vs dealer comparison table.
docs/frontend-handoff-finance.md: Portal finance views for admin internal use. Dealer self-service uses /api/v1/dealer-portal/ledger, /api/v1/dealer-portal/invoices, /api/v1/dealer-portal/aging.
docs/accounting-portal-frontend-engineer-handoff.md: Portal finance at /api/v1/portal/finance/* for admin. Dealer self-service at /api/v1/dealer-portal/*. Super-admin at /api/v1/superadmin/**.
surfaces.notes: All doc types consistently document three host tiers: /api/v1/superadmin/** (super-admin control-plane), /api/v1/portal/** (admin internal), /api/v1/dealer-portal/** (dealer self-service). Host isolation is consistently documented across module docs, flow docs, and handoff docs. RBAC enforcement is aligned (ROLE_SUPER_ADMIN, ROLE_ADMIN, ROLE_DEALER respectively). Support tickets consistently split into portal and dealer-portal hosts.

moduleDocs: docs/modules/catalog-setup.md: CatalogController at /api/v1/catalog/** with brands CRUD (5 endpoints), items CRUD + search (5 endpoints), import (1 endpoint). Production module owns catalog.
flowDocs: docs/flows/catalog-setup-readiness.md: Catalog brands at /api/v1/catalog/brands (CRUD). Catalog items at /api/v1/catalog/items (CRUD + search). Catalog import at /api/v1/catalog/import. SKU readiness via includeReadiness=true query param.
handoffDocs: docs/accounting-portal-frontend-engineer-handoff.md: Stock-bearing product setup at /api/v1/catalog/brands, /api/v1/catalog/items. Retired /api/v1/catalog/products and /api/v1/accounting/catalog/products redirect to /api/v1/catalog/items.
surfaces.notes: All doc types consistently document /api/v1/catalog/** as owned by the production module. CatalogController is the single canonical host. Retired paths (/api/v1/catalog/products, /api/v1/accounting/catalog/products) are consistently documented as replaced by /api/v1/catalog/items across all doc types including deprecated index.

moduleDocs: docs/modules/invoice.md: InvoiceController at /api/v1/invoices/* with ADMIN_SALES_ACCOUNTING role. PortalFinanceController at /api/v1/portal/finance/* with ADMIN_OR_ACCOUNTING role. Retired: /api/v1/dealers/{id}/ledger, /api/v1/dealers/{id}/invoices, /api/v1/dealers/{id}/aging replaced by /api/v1/portal/finance/*.

docs/modules/admin-portal-rbac.md: PortalFinanceController at /api/v1/portal/finance (ledger, invoices, aging) with ADMIN_OR_ACCOUNTING. DealerPortalController at /api/v1/dealer-portal/* with DEALER_ONLY.
flowDocs: docs/flows/invoice-dealer-finance.md: InvoiceController at /api/v1/invoices/** (list, detail, PDF, email, payments, settlement, void, reverse). PortalFinanceController at /api/v1/portal/finance/** (ledger, invoices, aging - admin/accounting). DealerPortalController at /api/v1/dealer-portal/** (dashboard, ledger, invoices, PDF, aging - dealer). Host isolation enforced.
docs/flows/order-to-cash.md: Invoice access via /api/v1/invoices. Dealer self-service at /api/v1/dealer-portal/**.
handoffDocs: docs/frontend-handoff-commercial.md: /api/v1/invoices/** for ADMIN/SALES/ACCOUNTING. /api/v1/portal/finance/* for ADMIN/ACCOUNTING. /api/v1/dealer-portal/** for DEALER. Comparison table maps ledger/invoices/aging to portal-finance (admin) vs dealer-portal (dealer).

docs/frontend-handoff-finance.md: Portal finance at /api/v1/portal/finance/ledger, /api/v1/portal/finance/invoices, /api/v1/portal/finance/aging (admin internal). Dealer self-service at /api/v1/dealer-portal/ledger, /api/v1/dealer-portal/invoices, /api/v1/dealer-portal/aging.

docs/accounting-portal-frontend-engineer-handoff.md: Internal dealer finance reads route through /api/v1/portal/finance/*. Dealer self-service at /api/v1/dealer-portal/*. Retired dealer/accounting/report aliases documented.
surfaces.notes: All doc types consistently document three invoice/finance surfaces: (1) /api/v1/invoices/** for invoice module operations (ADMIN_SALES_ACCOUNTING), (2) /api/v1/portal/finance/** for admin internal finance views (ADMIN_OR_ACCOUNTING), (3) /api/v1/dealer-portal/** for dealer self-service (DEALER_ONLY). Retired dealer-scoped aliases (/api/v1/dealers/{id}/ledger, etc.) are consistently redirected to /api/v1/portal/finance/*?dealerId={id}. Host isolation between portal finance and dealer-portal is consistently documented.

moduleDocs: docs/modules/purchasing.md: SupplierController at /api/v1/suppliers/** (7 endpoints). PurchasingWorkflowController at /api/v1/purchasing/purchase-orders/** (7 endpoints) and /api/v1/purchasing/goods-receipts/** (3 endpoints). RawMaterialPurchaseController at /api/v1/purchasing/raw-material-purchases/** (5 endpoints). All owned by purchasing module.
flowDocs: docs/flows/procure-to-pay.md: SupplierController at /api/v1/suppliers/** (7 endpoints). PurchasingWorkflowController at /api/v1/purchasing/purchase-orders/** (7 endpoints), /api/v1/purchasing/goods-receipts/** (3 endpoints). RawMaterialPurchaseController at /api/v1/purchasing/raw-material-purchases/** (5 endpoints). All roles ADMIN, ACCOUNTING.
handoffDocs: docs/frontend-handoff-commercial.md: /api/v1/suppliers/** (7 endpoints), /api/v1/purchasing/purchase-orders/** (7 endpoints), /api/v1/purchasing/goods-receipts/** (3 endpoints), /api/v1/purchasing/raw-material-purchases/** (5 endpoints). Module boundary: Purchasing module. Owner: /api/v1/purchasing/** + /api/v1/suppliers/**.
surfaces.notes: All doc types consistently document /api/v1/purchasing/** and /api/v1/suppliers/** as owned by the purchasing module. The four sub-surfaces (suppliers, purchase orders, goods receipts/GRN, raw material purchases) have consistent endpoint listings across module docs, flow docs, and handoff docs. Role requirements (ADMIN, ACCOUNTING) are consistent throughout.

moduleDocs: docs/modules/hr.md: HrController at /api/v1/hr (employees, leave, attendance, salary structures). HrPayrollController at /api/v1/payroll (runs, summaries). Legacy /api/v1/hr/payroll-runs returns 410 GONE, redirecting to /api/v1/payroll/runs. Module gating: HR_PAYROLL module controls /api/v1/payroll/**.
flowDocs: docs/flows/hr-payroll.md: HrController at /api/v1/hr/employees/**, /api/v1/hr/leave-**, /api/v1/hr/attendance/**, /api/v1/hr/salary-structures/**. HrPayrollController at /api/v1/payroll/** (runs, weekly, monthly, calculate, approve, post, mark-paid, summaries). Deprecated: /api/v1/hr/payroll-runs (410) → /api/v1/payroll/runs.
handoffDocs: docs/frontend-handoff-finance.md: /api/v1/hr/employees/** (5 endpoints), /api/v1/hr/leave-** (7 endpoints), /api/v1/hr/attendance/** (4 endpoints), /api/v1/hr/salary-structures/** (3 endpoints), /api/v1/payroll/** (11 endpoints). Module gating: /api/v1/payroll/** returns MODULE_DISABLED when HR module is off. Payroll posting: /api/v1/payroll/runs/{id}/post → /api/v1/accounting/journals.
docs/accounting-portal-frontend-engineer-handoff.md: References /api/v1/accounting/payroll/payments/batch for payment journal creation. HR marks run as PAID via /api/v1/payroll/runs/{id}/mark-paid.
surfaces.notes: All doc types consistently document two payroll hosts: /api/v1/hr/** for employee/leave/attendance/salary operations (HrController) and /api/v1/payroll/** for payroll run lifecycle (HrPayrollController). Legacy /api/v1/hr/payroll-runs endpoints are consistently documented as deprecated (410 GONE) with redirect to /api/v1/payroll/runs. Module gating behavior (MODULE_DISABLED when HR_PAYROLL disabled) is consistently documented. Payroll posting flow to accounting is consistent across all doc types.

summary: Tested 6 boundary surfaces for host/path ownership consistency across module docs, flow docs, and frontend handoff docs. All 6 surfaces (dispatch, portal/admin/dealer, catalog/setup, invoice/dealer-finance, purchasing/GRN, payroll) show consistent host/path ownership across all doc types. Zero inconsistencies found. All canonical paths, deprecated redirect paths, and host isolation boundaries are consistently documented.
